tools.Name: GenericAgent
tools.Description: A minimal, self-evolving autonomous agent framework that builds a skill tree from a ~3K-line seed code.
tools.Use_Case: Automating complex, multi-step tasks across browser, terminal, filesystem, and mobile devices.

tools.Name: Unsloth Studio
tools.Description: A unified local interface for running and training open-source models like Qwen, Gemma, and DeepSeek efficiently.
tools.Use_Case: Faster, VRAM-efficient fine-tuning and local deployment of LLMs with support for text, vision, and audio models.

tools.Name: Magika
tools.Description: A fast and highly accurate AI-powered file type detection tool developed by Google.
tools.Use_Case: Automated file classification and safety scanning at scale with high precision.
